item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Solid advice
item.description: FP Edit: I don't really know the etiquette for FP Edits, but I'd like to make anyone that doesn't know aware of @TheFreePizzaDude They assist fellow imgurians in need with meals. They kindly gifted me a pizza last night that will feed me through the weekend. I believe they take donations!
item.dc:creator: kittyfajitas

item.title: the harpy's meme library: volume 57 (cousin throcky)
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another meme dump, my imgur friends. The world continues it's chaotic journey, but at least there are memes to distract us. Onward!
ALL DOG. ARE PUPPER.
Apparently a real thing, but more of a joke than an accurate diagnostic tool. Thanks, cousin Throckmorton! https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Thomas_sign
...yeah probably.
Off by a couple weeks, but hell yeah. I had the opportunity to see Sue, she's at the Field Museum of Natural History in Chicago. She was massive and magnificent to behold. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sue_(dinosaur)
Yet another comic dog that looks exactly like Otto. He too thinks everything is for puppies.
Yeah, accurate.
Unfortunately, also accurate
seriously, why do I never learn
coo coo motherfucker All right, that's all for this meme dump installment. Until next time my friends, stay awesome.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.dc:creator: nclu

item.title: Good Guy Keanu Reeves signs 1-day contract with OHL team to help raise money for mental health
item.description: Movie star Keanu Reeves signed a one-day contract with the Ontario Hockey League's Windsor Spitfires on Thursday. It was to support the Canadian Mental Health Association's Windsor-Essex branch, which will auction off signed items from the actor and all proceeds going to the organization. Reeves was in the Ontario border city to play bass for his longtime American alternative rock band Dogstar at Windsor's casino Thursday. Reeves grew up in Toronto and was born in Beirut. According to NHL.com, the Matrix star was a goaltender and came close to trying out for the Spitfires when he was a teenager, but couldn't because of injury. After that, he went into acting full time. The story is legendary here in Windsor, says Bill Bowler, general manager of the Windsor Spitfires, so when they learned Reeves was coming to town, an employee of the organization reached out to see what could happen. "We thought it would be cute. We thought by getting him to sign a jersey, we're going to auction it off for the CMHA (Canadian Mental Health Association), and hopefully raise some money for a great cause," Bowler said. "And again, we can't thank Mr. Reeves enough." More people need to be like Keanu. Truly a genuine individual. #GoodGuyKeanuReeves
item.dc:creator: doxydad1

item.title: Boys should babysit more
item.description: I'm a dad of a 16yo boy who's school so far has been a bit of a strugle. Today he was babysitting for the first time and he sent me this picture. I couldn't be more proud. I don't care if he likes school or not. He is pure gold.
item.dc:creator: patrikjerkoff

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i'm an easy shag
i'm using this as me and fellow dumpers
why can't it just fly where it needs to go?
someone please live in this salad with me
ranch... bbq
i love stoner chicks
sorry about this one
are you ok, wisconsin?
mmm hmm
there goes my week
that's Robert California and U.S Marshal Vince Larkin
finally
they def look like nerds
i guess
i know ramen?
as is tradition
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: It's My Cake Day!
item.description: This is one of first ever posts from like 8 years ago. This was before we could post videos. What a mess, random white borders and no black outline on the captions. Of course the joke is Moss had only met this woman an hour before and now they're behaving like they've been married 20 years.
item.dc:creator: waspy17

item.title: I mean, I still want the shirt.
item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.title: Images of Note: Mrah!
item.description:
me
yes I have and no it hasn't worked
Listen: without Nixon, Trump wouldn't have happened.
Yeah don't fuck with the Furry community they: * Have more money than God * Run IT infrastructure * Know where you live.
What's that Jolteon doing looking in, what are they thinking?
Give PR statehood already, it's larger than Nevada
Why anyone would let Elon Musk near their brain is beyond me.
k i r b y
Soon that's all you will be allowed to do on windows /hj
they are...so concerned
BASICALLY!
This is the most wholesome thing I have seen.
owo
Mass shootings make republicans money, that's why they encourage them.
This is the face Kirby made when he learnt Thatcher had died.
Parrots are intelligent enough to understand what's going on, you traumatized that bird.
Imagine having to change your national anthem every time someone dies. (This meme was made by the Scots and the Welsh)
We need to bring back Planking. It's the perfect meme for these times.
IS HE WRONG THOUGH? IS HE FUCKING WRONG?
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
